---
title: "Caped Crusader"
subtitle: "A comic-book talk"
author: "Mickaël Canouil"
date: today
format:
  comic-revealjs: default
---

## Chapter 1: The Setup {.section}

A new chapter begins.

## A Single Panel {.panel}

- Paper background.
- Bold ink border.
- Caption sits in a yellow box.

::: {.caption}
Meanwhile, in the city...
:::

## {.action}

POW!

## {.action}

{{< bam "ZAP!" colour=blue >}}

## Hero says... {.speech}

With great Quarto comes great responsibility.

## Mixed slide

Plain content above the bubble.

::: {.speech}
Inline speech bubble inside a normal slide.
:::

## Plain Slide {.halftone}

This slide uses only the `.halftone` modifier on a standard slide.

It composes with any other styles.

## Code Highlighting {.panel}

```r
greet <- function(name) {
  paste0("Hello, ", name, "!")
}
```

## Two Columns

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
Left column content.
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
Right column content.
:::
:::

## Plain Default Slide

Slides without a class fall back to default Reveal.js styling.

This is a regression check.
